command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w6DdBww2bzwyZZ.root --database hB2F5YxeXakQRcL5WU36Vw --execute 
SELECT 'professors' as table_name, COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(DISTINCT university_name) as universities FROM professors
UNION ALL
SELECT 'university_field_images', COUNT(*), COUNT(DISTINCT university_name) FROM university_field_images;
